calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-09-2019 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Rupinder Kaur, Esq., specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-14-2019 Continued To May-07-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2018 Continued To Mar-05-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Mitchell Wong, Esq. appeared specially for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set Mar-05-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE TERI L. JACKSON; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610)
